archimate:ApplicationService.name: Metadata Management
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: Metadata Management ABB is an Application Service that enables functionalities for the i) creation, ii) storage, iii) categorisation and iv) retrieval of metadata.
Source: DAMA
Source reference: http://www.dama.org/
Example: The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Eurostat SDMX repository: The Euro SDMX Registry is Eurostat’s implementation of an SDMX registry to facilitate the exchange of statistical data and metadata by serving as a metadata repository. It stores the SDMX artefacts needed for the parties to access and interpret the content of the exchanged statistical data and metadata sets. http://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/sdmx-infospace/sdmx-it-tools/sdmx-registry
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - application
Viewpoint: Interoperability Privacy viewpoint
Interoperability Saliency: The Metadata management Service ABB is salient for interoperability because it provides and shares the functionalities to manage metadata. EIF recommends to prioritise it: "Put in place an information management strategy at the highest possible level to avoid fragmentation and duplication. Management of metadata, master data and reference data should be prioritised".
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataManagementApplicationService
ABB name: eira:MetadataManagementApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataManagementApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication

properties.value: Metadata Management ABB is an Application Service that enables functionalities for the i) creation, ii) storage, iii) categorisation and iv) retrieval of metadata.

The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Eurostat SDMX repository: The Euro SDMX Registry is Eurostat’s implementation of an SDMX registry to facilitate the exchange of statistical data and metadata by serving as a metadata repository. It stores the SDMX artefacts needed for the parties to access and interpret the content of the exchanged statistical data and metadata sets. http://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/sdmx-infospace/sdmx-it-tools/sdmx-registry

The Metadata management Service ABB is salient for interoperability because it provides and shares the functionalities to manage metadata. EIF recommends to prioritise it: "Put in place an information management strategy at the highest possible level to avoid fragmentation and duplication. Management of metadata, master data and reference data should be prioritised".
